# vigame — Full Reference

> An open-source game engine built for AI agents. Build games by generating VGX (vigame XML) scenes. Rendered via three.js (3D) or Phaser (2D). Full MCP server for live AI-to-game control.

---

## Architecture Overview

vigame is built on an Entity-Component-System (ECS) architecture:

- **World** — the root container holding all entities, components, systems, plugins, and events
- **Entity** — a plain integer ID; carries no data itself
- **Component** — typed data attached to an entity (e.g., Health, Transform, Mesh)
- **System** — a function that runs every frame and operates on entities matching a query
- **Plugin** — a self-contained feature bundle (renderer, input, physics, gameplay…)
- **Event** — fire-and-forget typed messages for decoupled communication

---

## VGX Format (vigame XML)

VGX is the scene description language. AI agents generate this XML to declare entire game worlds.

### Full document structure

```xml
<world renderer="three">
  <config clear-color="#87ceeb" gravity="0 -9.81 0" />

  <entity name="Player" tag="player">
    <transform pos="0 2 0" rot="0 0 0" scale="1 1 1" />
    <mesh shape="capsule" size="0.5 2" color="#ff6b35" cast-shadow="true" />
    <rigid-body type="dynamic" mass="70" gravity-scale="1" />
    <health current="100" max="100" regen-rate="1" />
    <inventory capacity="20" gold="0" />
    <score value="0" multiplier="1" />
  </entity>

  <entity name="Coin" tag="collectible">
    <transform pos="3 1 0" />
    <mesh shape="sphere" size="0.3" color="#f1c40f" />
    <collectible type="coin" value="10" />
  </entity>

  <entity name="Ground">
    <transform pos="0 -0.5 0" />
    <mesh shape="box" size="50 1 50" color="#4a7c59" receive-shadow="true" />
    <rigid-body type="static" />
  </entity>

  <entity name="Camera">
    <transform pos="0 5 10" rx="-20" />
    <camera fov="75" near="0.1" far="1000" />
  </entity>

  <entity name="Sun">
    <transform pos="10 20 10" />
    <directional-light color="#ffffff" intensity="1.2" cast-shadow="true" />
  </entity>

  <entity name="Sky">
    <ambient-light color="#b0d8ff" intensity="0.4" />
  </entity>
</world>
```

### World attributes

| Attribute  | Values             | Description                   |
|------------|--------------------|-------------------------------|
| `renderer` | `three` / `phaser` | Which renderer plugin to use  |

### `<config>` attributes

| Attribute     | Default        | Description                       |
|---------------|----------------|-----------------------------------|
| `clear-color` | `#000000`      | Background/sky color (hex)        |
| `gravity`     | `0 -9.81 0`    | Gravity vector "x y z"            |

### `<transform>` attributes (3D)

| Attribute | Default   | Description                       |
|-----------|-----------|-----------------------------------|
| `pos`     | `0 0 0`   | Position "x y z"                  |
| `rot`     | `0 0 0`   | Euler rotation in degrees "x y z" |
| `rx`      | `0`       | X rotation shorthand (degrees)    |
| `ry`      | `0`       | Y rotation shorthand              |
| `rz`      | `0`       | Z rotation shorthand              |
| `scale`   | `1 1 1`   | Scale "x y z"                     |

### `<mesh>` attributes

| Attribute      | Default    | Description                                               |
|----------------|------------|-----------------------------------------------------------|
| `shape`        | `box`      | box, sphere, capsule, cylinder, cone, plane, torus        |
| `color`        | `#ffffff`  | Hex color                                                 |
| `size`         | shape-dep. | box: "w h d", sphere: radius, capsule: "r h", cyl: "r h" |
| `wireframe`    | `false`    | Render as wireframe                                       |
| `cast-shadow`  | `true`     | Whether mesh casts shadows                                |
| `receive-shadow` | `true`   | Whether mesh receives shadows                             |

### `<rigid-body>` attributes

| Attribute      | Default     | Description                                               |
|----------------|-------------|-----------------------------------------------------------|
| `type`         | `dynamic`   | dynamic, static, kinematic-position, kinematic-velocity   |
| `mass`         | `1`         | Mass in kg                                                |
| `gravity-scale`| `1`         | Multiplier on gravity                                     |
| `restitution`  | `0.3`       | Bounciness (0–1)                                          |
| `friction`     | `0.7`       | Friction coefficient                                      |

### `<camera>` attributes

| Attribute | Default | Description        |
|-----------|---------|--------------------|
| `fov`     | `75`    | Field of view      |
| `near`    | `0.1`   | Near clip plane    |
| `far`     | `1000`  | Far clip plane     |

### `<directional-light>` attributes

| Attribute    | Default    | Description                  |
|--------------|------------|------------------------------|
| `color`      | `#ffffff`  | Light color                  |
| `intensity`  | `1`        | Brightness                   |
| `cast-shadow`| `false`    | Whether this light casts shadows |

### `<ambient-light>` attributes

| Attribute   | Default   | Description   |
|-------------|-----------|---------------|
| `color`     | `#ffffff` | Light color   |
| `intensity` | `0.5`     | Brightness    |

### `<health>` attributes (@vigame/gameplay)

| Attribute    | Default | Description                    |
|--------------|---------|--------------------------------|
| `current`    | `100`   | Current HP                     |
| `max`        | `100`   | Maximum HP                     |
| `regen-rate` | `0`     | HP regenerated per second      |
| `invincible` | `false` | If true, damage is ignored     |

### `<inventory>` attributes (@vigame/gameplay)

| Attribute  | Default | Description                  |
|------------|---------|------------------------------|
| `capacity` | `10`    | Max item slots               |
| `gold`     | `0`     | Starting gold amount         |

### `<score>` attributes (@vigame/gameplay)

| Attribute    | Default | Description           |
|--------------|---------|-----------------------|
| `value`      | `0`     | Starting score        |
| `multiplier` | `1`     | Score multiplier      |

### `<collectible>` attributes (@vigame/gameplay)

| Attribute   | Default   | Description                              |
|-------------|-----------|------------------------------------------|
| `type`      | `generic` | Collectible category (e.g. "coin")       |
| `value`     | `1`       | Score/gold value when collected          |

---

## TypeScript API — @vigame/core

### World lifecycle

```typescript
import { createWorld, startWorld, stopWorld, pauseWorld, resumeWorld, stepWorld } from '@vigame/core';

const world = createWorld({ plugins: [MyPlugin()] });
startWorld(world);   // starts the game loop (rAF in browser, setInterval in Node)
pauseWorld(world);
resumeWorld(world);
stepWorld(world, 1/60); // manually advance one frame
stopWorld(world);
```

### Entity operations

```typescript
import { addEntity, removeEntity, hasEntity, getAllEntities } from '@vigame/core';

const eid = addEntity(world);
removeEntity(world, eid);
hasEntity(world, eid);        // boolean
getAllEntities(world);         // EntityId[]
```

### Component operations

```typescript
import { defineComponent, Type, addComponent, removeComponent, getComponent, hasComponent, setComponent } from '@vigame/core';

// Define a component schema
const Velocity = defineComponent('Velocity', {
  x: Type.Number({ default: 0 }),
  y: Type.Number({ default: 0 }),
  z: Type.Number({ default: 0 }),
});

// Use it
const eid = addEntity(world);
addComponent(world, eid, Velocity, { x: 5, z: -3 });
const vel = getComponent(world, eid, Velocity);   // { x: 5, y: 0, z: -3 }
setComponent(world, eid, Velocity, { x: 0 });      // partial update
hasComponent(world, eid, Velocity);                // true
removeComponent(world, eid, Velocity);
```

### Type builders

```typescript
Type.Number({ default: 0, min: 0, max: 100 })
Type.String({ default: 'idle' })
Type.Boolean({ default: false })
Type.Vec2({ default: [0, 0] })
Type.Vec3({ default: [0, 0, 0] })
Type.Vec4({ default: [0, 0, 0, 0] })
Type.Quaternion({ default: [0, 0, 0, 1] })
Type.Array(Type.Number())
Type.Object({ x: Type.Number(), y: Type.Number() })
Type.Enum(['idle', 'walk', 'run'])
Type.Ref()   // EntityId reference
```

### Query API

```typescript
import { query, queryFirst, queryTag, queryName } from '@vigame/core';

const entities = query(world, [Transform, Velocity]);     // AND query
const first = queryFirst(world, [Transform, Velocity]);   // first match or undefined
const players = queryTag(world, 'player');                // by tag
const cam = queryName(world, 'Camera');                   // by name (EntityId | undefined)
```

### Tags and names

```typescript
import { addTag, removeTag, hasTag, getEntityName, setEntityName } from '@vigame/core';

addTag(world, eid, 'enemy');
hasTag(world, eid, 'enemy');    // true
removeTag(world, eid, 'enemy');
setEntityName(world, eid, 'Boss');
getEntityName(world, eid);      // 'Boss'
```

### System definition

Systems run every frame in phase order. Phases:

| Phase       | Value | Description                    |
|-------------|-------|--------------------------------|
| PreUpdate   | 0     | Input, timers, early logic     |
| Update      | 1     | Main game logic                |
| PostUpdate  | 2     | Physics resolution, late logic |
| Render      | 3     | Rendering                      |

```typescript
import { defineSystem, Phase } from '@vigame/core';

const MovementSystem = defineSystem({
  name: 'Movement',
  phase: Phase.Update,
  after: ['Input'],   // optional ordering within phase
  before: ['Physics'],
  execute(world, delta) {
    const entities = query(world, [Transform, Velocity]);
    for (const eid of entities) {
      const t = getComponent(world, eid, Transform)!;
      const v = getComponent(world, eid, Velocity)!;
      setComponent(world, eid, Transform, {
        x: t.x + v.x * delta,
        y: t.y + v.y * delta,
        z: t.z + v.z * delta,
      });
    }
  },
});
```

### Event system

```typescript
import { defineEvent, emit, on, off } from '@vigame/core';

const ExplosionEvent = defineEvent<{ position: [number, number, number]; radius: number }>('Explosion');

// Subscribe
const unsubscribe = on(world, ExplosionEvent, ({ position, radius }) => {
  console.log('Explosion at', position, 'radius', radius);
});

// Emit
emit(world, ExplosionEvent, { position: [0, 0, 0], radius: 5 });

// Unsubscribe
unsubscribe();
// or
off(world, ExplosionEvent, handler);
```

### Prefabs

```typescript
import { definePrefab, registerPrefab, instantiatePrefab } from '@vigame/core';

const EnemyPrefab = definePrefab('Enemy', (world, overrides) => {
  const eid = addEntity(world);
  addComponent(world, eid, Health, { current: 50, max: 50 });
  addComponent(world, eid, Transform, overrides?.transform ?? { x: 0, y: 0, z: 0 });
  addTag(world, eid, 'enemy');
  return eid;
});

registerPrefab(world, EnemyPrefab);
const eid = instantiatePrefab(world, 'Enemy', { transform: { x: 5, y: 0, z: 0 } });
```

---

## TypeScript API — @vigame/gameplay

### Components

```typescript
import { Health, Inventory, Score, Collectible } from '@vigame/gameplay';

addComponent(world, eid, Health, { current: 100, max: 100, regenRate: 2 });
addComponent(world, eid, Inventory, { capacity: 10, gold: 0 });
addComponent(world, eid, Score, { value: 0, multiplier: 1 });
addComponent(world, eid, Collectible, { type: 'coin', value: 10 });
```

### Gameplay helper functions

```typescript
import { damage, heal, isAlive, addScore, collect } from '@vigame/gameplay';

damage(world, eid, 25);            // reduces health by 25, emits DamageEvent, DeathEvent if 0
damage(world, eid, 25, sourceEid); // optionally pass damage source
heal(world, eid, 10);              // increases health up to max, emits HealEvent
isAlive(world, eid);               // false if health === 0 (true if no Health component)
addScore(world, eid, 100);         // adds 100 * multiplier to Score
collect(world, playerEid, coinEid); // marks collected, adds score, adds gold if type='coin'
```

### Gameplay events

```typescript
import { DamageEvent, HealEvent, DeathEvent, CollectEvent } from '@vigame/gameplay';

on(world, DamageEvent, ({ target, amount, source }) => { /* ... */ });
on(world, HealEvent, ({ target, amount }) => { /* ... */ });
on(world, DeathEvent, ({ entity }) => { /* respawn logic ... */ });
on(world, CollectEvent, ({ collector, collectible, type, value }) => { /* ... */ });
```

### GameplayPlugin

```typescript
import { GameplayPlugin } from '@vigame/gameplay';

const world = createWorld({
  plugins: [
    ThreeRendererPlugin({ canvas }),
    GameplayPlugin(),
  ],
});
```

`GameplayPlugin` registers:
- `HealthRegenSystem` (Phase.Update) — auto-heals entities with `regenRate > 0`
- VGX tag handlers for `<health>`, `<inventory>`, `<score>`, `<collectible>`

---

## TypeScript API — @vigame/scene

```typescript
import { parseVGX, serializeVGX, hydrateScene } from '@vigame/scene';

// Parse VGX string into an intermediate VGXWorld object
const vgxWorld = parseVGX(xmlString);

// Hydrate into an ECS world (applies all entities + components)
hydrateScene(vgxWorld, world);

// Serialize ECS world back to VGX string
const xml = serializeVGX(world);
```

---

## TypeScript API — @vigame/input

```typescript
import { InputPlugin, isKeyDown, isKeyJustPressed, getMousePosition, isMouseButtonDown } from '@vigame/input';

const world = createWorld({ plugins: [InputPlugin(canvas)] });

// Inside a system:
isKeyDown(world, 'KeyW');           // true while W is held
isKeyJustPressed(world, 'Space');   // true only on the frame Space was pressed
isMouseButtonDown(world, 0);        // left button
getMousePosition(world);            // { x, y } in canvas pixels
```

---

## TypeScript API — @vigame/physics

```typescript
import { PhysicsPlugin } from '@vigame/physics';

const world = createWorld({
  plugins: [
    PhysicsPlugin({ gravity: [0, -9.81, 0] }),
  ],
});

// VGX <rigid-body> and <collider> tags are automatically handled
// Use setComponent(world, eid, Transform, ...) to read back physics-simulated positions
```

---

## Plugin Authoring

A plugin is any object implementing `VibePlugin`:

```typescript
import type { VibePlugin, World, EntityId } from '@vigame/core';
import { addComponent, defineComponent, Type, defineSystem, query } from '@vigame/core';

const Temperature = defineComponent('Temperature', {
  celsius: Type.Number({ default: 20 }),
});

const HeatSystem = defineSystem({
  name: 'Heat',
  phase: 1,
  execute(world, delta) {
    for (const eid of query(world, [Temperature])) {
      // ...
    }
  },
});

export function TemperaturePlugin(): VibePlugin {
  return {
    name: 'TemperaturePlugin',
    dependencies: [],           // optional: other plugin names that must be registered first
    setup(world: World) {
      // initialization (subscribe to events, set up resources, etc.)
    },
    systems(world: World) {
      return [HeatSystem];
    },
    teardown(world: World) {
      // cleanup on world stop
    },
    vgxTags() {
      return {
        temperature(world: World, eid: EntityId, attrs: Record<string, string>) {
          addComponent(world, eid, Temperature, {
            celsius: Number(attrs['celsius'] ?? '20'),
          });
        },
      };
    },
  };
}
```

---

## MCP Tools Reference

When `VigameBridgePlugin()` is registered in the running game, an AI agent connected via MCP can use these tools:

### `scene`
```
action: load | save | clear | info
vgx: string (for load)
```

### `entity`
```
action: create | delete | find | list | rename
name: string
tag: string
new_name: string
```

### `component`
```
action: add | remove | set | get | list_available
entity: EntityId | name string
component: component name
data: object (for add/set)
```

### `transform`
```
action: set_position | set_rotation | set_scale | look_at
entity: EntityId | name string
x, y, z: number
target: EntityId | name string (for look_at)
```

### `query`
```
action: by_component | by_tag | by_name | all
component: string
tag: string
name: string
```

### `runtime`
```
action: play | pause | step | stop | reset
delta: number (for step)
```

### `inspect`
```
action: screenshot | world_state | schemas | systems
```

### `vgx`
```
action: parse | serialize | validate | patch
vgx: string
patch: object (for patch)
```

---

## MCP Setup

### In your game (browser)

```typescript
import { createWorld, startWorld } from '@vigame/core';
import { VigameBridgePlugin } from '@vigame/mcp';

const world = createWorld({
  plugins: [
    ThreeRendererPlugin({ canvas }),
    GameplayPlugin(),
    ...(import.meta.env.DEV ? [VigameBridgePlugin({ port: 7777 })] : []),
  ],
});
startWorld(world);
```

### MCP server config (.claude/settings.json)

```json
{
  "mcpServers": {
    "vigame": {
      "command": "npx",
      "args": ["vigame-mcp"],
      "env": { "VIGAME_BRIDGE_PORT": "7777" }
    }
  }
}
```

---

## System Phase Ordering

Systems execute in this order every frame:

1. **PreUpdate (0)** — Input capture, timer ticks
2. **Update (1)** — Game logic, AI, movement, health regen
3. **PostUpdate (2)** — Physics sync, collision response, late logic
4. **Render (3)** — Three.js/Phaser scene sync and draw

Within a phase, use `after: ['SystemName']` and `before: ['SystemName']` in the system definition for fine-grained ordering.

---

## Query API — cheat sheet

```typescript
// All entities with both components
query(world, [Health, Transform])

// First entity with component (or undefined)
queryFirst(world, [Health])

// Entities with a tag
queryTag(world, 'enemy')

// Entity by name (returns EntityId | undefined)
queryName(world, 'Player')
```

---

## Schema introspection

```typescript
import { getComponentSchemas, getRegisteredComponents } from '@vigame/core';

getRegisteredComponents(world);  // string[] of component names in use
getComponentSchemas(world);      // Record<name, JSON Schema object>
```
